name: Rolled Roast Beef Tortillas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Hellmann's Real Or Light Mayonnaise or Low Fat Mayonnaise Dressing
1 Tablespoon Hellmann's Dijonnaise Creamy Mustard Blend
1 Jar (7 Oz.) Roasted Red Peppers, Drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together mayonnaise, creamy mustard blend, ketchup, and minced garlic.
2. Spread each tortilla generously with the mayo mixture. Top with roast beef, lettuce, roasted red peppers, onion, and additional mayo mixture. Roll up; cut diagonally in half.
